ItacAcademyItem.Name: Invigoriti (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: See Fantuzzi, Notizie degli Scrittori bolognesi, for details and publications related to the history of the Invigoriti Academy.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
